headlines.title: Trump-endorsed Ed Gallrein unseats Rep. Thomas Massie in Kentucky GOP primary
headlines.description: Former Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein has won the Republican primary in Kentucky’s 4th Congressional District over Rep. Thomas Massie.

headlines.title: Trump-backed Andy Barr wins GOP nomination for Mitch McConnell’s Senate seat in Kentucky
headlines.description: Rep. Andy Barr, riding an endorsement from President Donald Trump, has won the Republican primary in the race for retiring Sen.

headlines.title: Josh Shapiro and Stacy Garrity prepare to face off for governor of Pennsylvania this fall
headlines.description: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro and state Treasurer Stacy Garrity will face off this fall in a ticket-topping race for governor in the nation’s largest swing state

headlines.title: Trump-backed Andy Barr wins GOP nomination for Mitch McConnell’s Senate seat in Kentucky
headlines.description: Rep. Andy Barr, riding an endorsement from President Donald Trump, has won the Republican primary in the race for retiring Sen.

headlines.title: Justice Department agrees not to pursue any tax claims against Trump as part of IRS deal
headlines.description: The addendum comes a day after the Justice Department announced that Trump and his co-plaintiffs would drop their $10 billion suit against the IRS.

headlines.title: New details in deadly mosque attack
headlines.description: Authorities said they are analyzing a potential manifesto from the two suspected gunmen. Plus, we’re learning more about the heroic actions of the victims. NBC News’ Morgan Chesky reports.

headlines.title: American doctor with Ebola evacuated to Germany as wife and kids are monitored in Congo
headlines.description: By the time the American surgeon who contracted Ebola was flown to Germany, he was barely able to stand on his own, according to leaders of the Christian missionary group where he worked.

headlines.title: Senate advances resolution to end Iran war as GOP Sen. Bill Cassidy flips to support it
headlines.description: The Senate voted to move forward with a resolution to force President Donald Trump to end the war in Iran, a breakthrough for the Democratic-led effort.

headlines.title: Raúl Castro is expected to be indicted by U.S. on Wednesday, sources say
headlines.description: A U.S. indictment of former Cuban president Raúl Castro is expected to be announced Wednesday in Miami, two federal sources familiar with the investigation told NBC News
